title: Chomper
move_pattern: Alternates: Clamp → Screech → (repeat). Normally starts with Clamp, but may start with Screech in certain encounters.
notes: Starts combat with 2 Artifact, making it immune to the first 2 debuffs applied to it. Screech adds 3 Dazed cards directly to the player's discard pile. The Chomper may be configured via ScreamFirst to open with Screech instead of Clamp in specific encounters.
